_comment: Curated permalinks for the dashboard 'Discover' panel. Each key matches a CURIO_SOURCES entry in dashboard.html. Add objects of the form {title, link, excerpt?, image?}. Empty arrays are skipped at random-pick time.

lileks-galleries.title: Gallery of Regrettable Food
lileks-galleries.excerpt: An aesthetic study of mid-century American cookbooks. The food is bad. The presentation is worse.

lileks-galleries.title: Interior Desecrators
lileks-galleries.excerpt: 1970s home decor, archived for posterity, mocked with affection.

lileks-galleries.title: The Institute of Official Cheer
lileks-galleries.excerpt: Lileks's master index of vintage commercial-art galleries.

lileks-galleries.title: Motel Postcards
lileks-galleries.excerpt: The American roadside motel, as seen on the postcards that sold the rooms.

maddox.title: I am better than your kids
maddox.excerpt: The foundational rant: Maddox grades children's artwork on its merits, mercilessly. The piece that launched a thousand imitators.

maddox.title: Five things that sucked about Lord of the Rings
maddox.excerpt: A contrarian takedown of the untouchable, written at the peak of the trilogy's worship.

maddox.title: The Matrix: Revolutions is boring and shitty
maddox.excerpt: A point-by-point autopsy of the sequel nobody wanted to admit was bad.

maddox.title: Garfield sucks
maddox.excerpt: An impassioned case against the laziest cat in newspaper history.

maddox.title: Pepperoni is for assholes and idiots
maddox.excerpt: A treatise on pizza toppings, delivered with disproportionate fury.

maddox.title: I hate BuzzFeed
maddox.excerpt: A prescient 2013 evisceration of listicle culture and content farming.

maddox.title: You're not a nerd, geeks aren't sexy, and you don't "fucking love" science
maddox.excerpt: On the performative cosplay of intelligence in the social-media age.

maddox.title: Not everything is epic, shitheads
maddox.excerpt: A campaign against the inflation of a once-meaningful word.

maddox.title: Nobody cares if your puns were intended
maddox.excerpt: A short, sharp strike against the most insufferable parenthetical in English.

maddox.title: Anyone who doesn't like onions is an idiot
maddox.excerpt: An aggressive defence of the world's most foundational vegetable.

maddox.title: Learn how to cook, moron
maddox.excerpt: A no-excuses manifesto on basic kitchen competence.

maddox.title: The most overrated sandwiches in America
maddox.excerpt: A ranking nobody asked for, defended like a doctoral thesis.

maddox.title: Shitty inventions that everybody loves
maddox.excerpt: On the everyday objects we tolerate despite their obvious failures.

maddox.title: Math doesn't suck, you do
maddox.excerpt: A defence of mathematics aimed squarely at the people who brag about being bad at it.

maddox.title: Self-checkout lanes are garbage and so are the people who use them
maddox.excerpt: A grocery-store grievance escalated to first principles.

maddox.title: How to watch a movie in a theater
maddox.excerpt: Field instructions for the basic courtesies of a darkened room.

maddox.title: Astrology is bullshit. Astrology is bullshit. Astrology is bullshit
maddox.excerpt: The title is the thesis, repeated for the people in the back.
